ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. AT TRIAL CALL FOR BRAYTON GROUP 470, PLTF'S COUNSEL, JOHN GOLDSTEIN, STATED ON THE RECORD THAT CASE# 435956 (WASHINGTON) SHOULD HAVE BEEN A PART OF THE GROUP 470. DEFT PLANT INSULATION FILED AN ANSWER AFTER THE CASE WAS TAKEN OFF THE TRIAL CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF SENT A LETTER TO THE COURT TO REPORT A FULL SETTLEMENT IN THIS CASE. THE COURT ORDERED A HEARING SET ON 5/28/09 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT ORDERED PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROGRESS REPORT OF ALL BRAYTON PURCELL CASES IN SIMILAR SITUATIONS BY 5/21/09. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION THROUGH ALL ATTORNEYS TO MEET AND CONFER WITH BRAYTON PURCELL FOR ALL THEIR CASES THAT FIT THE SAME DESCRIPTION WHERE DEFENDANTS JOINED INTO THE CASE AFTER SETTLEMENT WAS REPORTED. JOINT REPORT IS DUE BY 5/21/09. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206) HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
